reviews.comment:
Muy concurrida, siempre hay que esperar bastante, es un punto obligado para la gente que viaja por la 40 o la 150, tiene un buen lugar donde tomar cafe o comer algo, baños limpios, le faltaria surtido en oferta de shop y opciones para desayunar y almorzar, ofrecer mas ya que hay gente que viene viajando de muy lejos y esa es como la parada obligada, pero es una muy buena estacion de servicios. Personal amable siempre.

(Translated by Google)
Very busy, there's always a long wait. It's a must-stop for people traveling on Route 40 or Route 150. It has a good place to get coffee or something to eat, and the restrooms are clean. It could use a wider selection of snacks and breakfast and lunch options. They should offer more, as some people travel from far away and this is a necessary stop for them. But it's a very good service station. The staff is always friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKcXZDYU9REAE
